controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resource raising norms) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resource raising norms) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the all india financial institutions (aifis) regulated by the reserve bank, viz
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to the All India Financial Institutions (AIFIs)
regulated by the Reserve Bank, viz., the Export-Import Bank of India (EXIM Bank),
the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD), the National
Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID), the National
Housing Bank (NHB), and the Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the all india financial institutions (aifis) regulated by the reserve bank, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to adhere to the ul
controls.control_description: However, an AIFI shall continue to adhere to the UL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to adhere to the ul

controls.control_objective: To ensure at any time exceed 100 per cent of the nof of an aifi as per its latest audited balance sheet, or as approved by the rbi
controls.control_description:
The aggregate borrowings under the UL shall not at any time exceed 100 per cent
of the NOF of an AIFI as per its latest audited balance sheet, or as approved by
the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at any time exceed 100 per cent of the nof of an aifi as per its latest audited balance sheet, or as approved by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of borrowings through four specified instruments, viz
controls.control_description:
The UL shall consist of borrowings through four specified instruments, viz., term
deposits (TDs), term money borrowings, certificates of deposits (CDs), and
commercial papers (CPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of borrowings through four specified instruments, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the norms prescribed in this chapter
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions relating to resource
mobilization by an AIFI through the various instruments shall be governed by the
norms prescribed in this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the norms prescribed in this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to raise tds for a maturity period of not less than one year and not exceeding five years
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be permitted to raise TDs for a maturity period of not less than one
year and not exceeding five years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to raise tds for a maturity period of not less than one year and not exceeding five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be of a minimum denomination of ₹10,000
controls.control_description: Provided that the TDs shall be of a minimum denomination of ₹10,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be of a minimum denomination of ₹10,000

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay brokerage exceeding one per cent of the deposits accepted
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the AIFI shall not pay brokerage exceeding one per cent of
the deposits accepted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay brokerage exceeding one per cent of the deposits accepted

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow premature withdrawal of tds before completion of one year
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall not allow premature withdrawal of TDs before completion of one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow premature withdrawal of tds before completion of one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted in case of death of the depositor, medical exigencies, educational expenditure, and other such reasons, as approved by the board of the a
controls.control_description:
Provided that premature withdrawal of TDs before completion of one year shall be
permitted in case of death of the depositor, medical exigencies, educational
expenditure, and other such reasons, as approved by the Board of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted in case of death of the depositor, medical exigencies, educational expenditure, and other such reasons, as approved by the board of the a

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to fix its own penal rate of interest on premature withdrawal of deposits
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall have the freedom to fix its own penal rate of interest on premature
withdrawal of deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to fix its own penal rate of interest on premature withdrawal of deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable to the depositor
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that for deposits where premature withdrawal has been made before
completion of six months, no interest shall be payable to the depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable to the depositor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable at the rate of average of the minimum and maximum saving deposit rates as published in the weekly statistical supplement (wss) to the month
controls.control_description:
Provided further that for deposits where premature withdrawal has been made on
the date of or after completion of six months and before completion of one year,
interest shall be payable at the rate of average of the minimum and maximum
saving deposit rates as published in the Weekly Statistical Supplement (WSS) to
the monthly RBI Bulletin.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable at the rate of average of the minimum and maximum saving deposit rates as published in the weekly statistical supplement (wss) to the month

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily have its tds rated from a sebi-approved credit rating agency
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall mandatorily have its TDs rated from a SEBI-approved Credit Rating
Agency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandatorily have its tds rated from a sebi-approved credit rating agency

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to provide loans against the tds accepted
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to provide loans against the TDs accepted, unless
specifically permitted by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to provide loans against the tds accepted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to borrow through term money for a maturity period of not less than three months and not exceeding six months
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be permitted to borrow through term money for a maturity period of
not less than three months and not exceeding six months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to borrow through term money for a maturity period of not less than three months and not exceeding six months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free to fix the interest rates payable on the term money borrowings
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall be free to fix the interest rates payable on the term money borrowings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free to fix the interest rates payable on the term money borrowings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to borrow term money only from scheduled commercial banks and co-operative banks
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be permitted to borrow term money only from scheduled commercial
banks and co-operative banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to borrow term money only from scheduled commercial banks and co-operative banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with sebi
controls.control_description:
CDs shall be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository
registered with SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to issue cds to all persons resident in india
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall be permitted to issue CDs to all persons resident in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to issue cds to all persons resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in a minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter
controls.control_description:
CDs shall be issued in a minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5
lakh thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in a minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than one year and shall not exceed three years
controls.control_description:
The tenor of a CD at issuance shall not be less than one year and shall not exceed
three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than one year and shall not exceed three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to buy back its own cds before maturity
controls.control_description:
Provided that the AIFI shall not be permitted to buy back its own CDs before
maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to buy back its own cds before maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no grace period for repayment of cds
controls.control_description: Provided further that there shall be no grace period for repayment of CDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no grace period for repayment of cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned by an aifi against its cds
controls.control_description:
Provided further that no loans shall be sanctioned by an AIFI against its CDs,
unless specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned by an aifi against its cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued on a t+1 basis where t represents the date of closure of the offer period for issuance of the cds
controls.control_description:
CDs shall be issued on a T+1 basis where T represents the date of closure of the
offer period for issuance of the CDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued on a t+1 basis where t represents the date of closure of the offer period for issuance of the cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to issue cds at a discount to face value
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall be permitted to issue CDs at a discount to face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to issue cds at a discount to face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis
controls.control_description: Provided that CDs shall be permitted to be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reset at periodic rests agreed to at the time of issue and shall be linked to a benchmark published by a financial benchmark administrator, as auth
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the interest rate on the floating rate CDs shall be reset at
periodic rests agreed to at the time of issue and shall be linked to a benchmark
published by a Financial Benchmark Administrator, as authorised by Reserve
Bank, or approved by the FIMMDA for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reset at periodic rests agreed to at the time of issue and shall be linked to a benchmark published by a financial benchmark administrator, as auth

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively, and in arm's length transactions
controls.control_description:
Provided further that FIMMDA shall ensure that any floating rate approved by them
for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively, and in arm's length
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively, and in arm's length transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be traded either in over the counter (otc) markets, including on electronic trading platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with approval of the r
controls.control_description:
In the secondary market, CDs shall be traded either in Over the Counter (OTC)
markets, including on Electronic Trading Platforms, or on recognised stock
exchanges with approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be traded either in over the counter (otc) markets, including on electronic trading platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with approval of the r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be t+0 or t+1
controls.control_description: Provided that the settlement cycle for OTC trades in CDs shall be T+0 or T+1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be t+0 or t+1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled on a delivery versus payment (dvp) basis through the clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved
controls.control_description:
Provided further that all secondary market transactions in CDs shall be settled on
a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) basis through the clearing corporation of any
recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled on a delivery versus payment (dvp) basis through the clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the issuer to the trade repository (tr) of the clearing corporation of india ltd
controls.control_description:
Reporting requirements
(1) Details of primary issuance of a CD shall be reported by the issuer to the Trade
Repository (TR) of the Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the issuer to the trade repository (tr) of the clearing corporation of india ltd

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported, with time stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the tr by each counterparty to the transaction
controls.control_description:
(2) All secondary market transactions executed in the OTC market and / or on
recognised stock exchanges in CDs shall be reported, with time stamp, within 15
minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the TR by each
counterparty to the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported, with time stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the tr by each counterparty to the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the instructions contained in master direction - reserve bank of india (commercial paper and non-convertible debentures of original or
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be governed by the instructions contained in Master Direction -
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of
original or initial maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the instructions contained in master direction - reserve bank of india (commercial paper and non-convertible debentures of original or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to raise resources by way of issue of bonds, either by public issue or through private placement, without the prior approval of the rbi
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be permitted to raise resources by way of issue of bonds, either by
public issue or through private placement, without the prior approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to raise resources by way of issue of bonds, either by public issue or through private placement, without the prior approval of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 3 years
controls.control_description: Provided that the minimum maturity of the bond at issuance shall be 3 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 3 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to be either at a fixed rate or at a floating rate referenced to a market determined benchmark rate
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the interest / coupon payable to the investors shall be
permitted to be either at a fixed rate or at a floating rate referenced to a market
determined benchmark rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to be either at a fixed rate or at a floating rate referenced to a market determined benchmark rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exercisable before the expiry of one year from the date of issue of the bonds
controls.control_description:
Provided further that no call or put or exit options (by whatever name called) on the
bonds shall be exercisable before the expiry of one year from the date of issue of
the bonds
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exercisable before the expiry of one year from the date of issue of the bonds

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to comply with the provisions of any directions, regulations, or guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicab
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall ensure to comply with the provisions of any directions, regulations, or
guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicable, in
respect of issue of all the above-mentioned instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure to comply with the provisions of any directions, regulations, or guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicab

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed instructions or guidelines shall continue to be governed
by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
